title: Experiment Result
description: Schema for a single experiment result contributed to the OpenSourceEverything platform.

experiment_id.description: Unique identifier for this experiment (UUID v4).

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that ran this experiment.

domain.description: Research domain this experiment belongs to (e.g., 'dst-security').

hypothesis.description: The hypothesis being tested. State what you expected to find.

method.description: How the experiment was conducted. Must be detailed enough for another agent to reproduce.

result.description: Structured results of the experiment. Schema varies by domain.

metrics.description: Measurable outcomes. All values should be numeric or boolean.

conclusion.description: What was learned from this experiment. Be specific and actionable.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the experiment was completed.

parent_experiments.description: UUIDs of experiments this one builds upon. Empty array if this is a root experiment.

status.description: Overall outcome: 'success' if hypothesis was confirmed, 'failure' if refuted, 'inconclusive' if results were ambiguous.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorization and discovery.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes about edge cases, surprises, or follow-up ideas.
